CreatePermissionGroupRules.agName: The name of the permission group for the rule to be created.
CreatePermissionGroupRules.ip: Authorized IP address (virtual VPC IP). Supports single IP or subnet (combined with mask). Supports IPv4 and IPv6, e.g. 10.10.1.123 or 2001::/16.
CreatePermissionGroupRules.mask: Used with the ip parameter to specify a subnet. Set to 32 for a single IPv4 address or 128 for a single IPv6 address.
CreatePermissionGroupRules.writeAccess: Read/write rule. Supported values: "read_only" for read-only access, "read_write" for read-write access.
CreatePermissionGroupRules.userAccess: User permission rule. Supported values: "no_squash" (no root restriction), "root_squash" (restrict root user), "all_squash" (restrict all users).
CreatePermissionGroupRules.priority: Rule priority. Valid range: 1–100, where 1 is the highest priority.
